note: SPDX license IDs accepted for prod-closure packages. A prod package whose `license` is absent or not an exact member here is a license-violation (exit 3) and must be reviewed before its ID is added. Seeded from the 2.16.0 shipped closure (MIT/ISC/BSD-2-Clause/BSD-3-Clause) plus standard permissive families. SPDX expressions (e.g. "(MIT OR Apache-2.0)") are intentionally flagged until reviewed and added verbatim, so a dual-license entry cannot slip a copyleft term in unnoticed.
